---
title: "The Science Repository"
subtitle: "Consumer Decision-Making Analysis in R — workshop edition"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

This site is the rendered output of a complete R analysis project. Everything
you see was produced from the same git repository — code, data, figures,
text, and bibliography all live in one place.

## Read

- **[The walkthrough](00_walkthrough.qmd)** — a three-day tour from raw data
  to mediation/moderation results to a publishable report. Start here.
- **[Your report (template)](01_overview.qmd)** — an empty starter you can
  copy when you write your own analysis.

## Build

Clone the repo, restore the R environment, and render this site yourself:

```bash
git clone <your-fork-url>
cd the-science-repository
R -e 'renv::restore()'
quarto render
```

See the [project README](https://github.com/your-username/the-science-repository#readme)
for the full setup and folder map.
